word: ืงึท๏ฌซึฐืงึถ๏ฌซึถืช

sections.paragraph: pl. ืงึท๏ฌซึฐืงึท๏ฌซึผึดืื 1Sa 17:5, and ืงึท๏ฌซึฐืงึฐ๏ฌซึนืืช Eze 29:4, f. a scale, so called from its peeling off, see the root ืงึธ๏ฌซึธื . Lev 11:9, seqq. ๏ฌชึดืจึฐืึนืื ืงึท๏ฌซึฐืงึท๏ฌซึผึดืื a coat of mail made of scales, i.e. consisting of thin iron plates like scales, 1Sa 17:5.
